basking-sharks.title: The Slow Giants: Why Basking Sharks Return to the Hebrides
basking-sharks.subtitle: The world's second-largest fish drifts each summer through a stretch of cold Atlantic between Coll and Canna, mouth held wide for a soup of copepods. After a century of slaughter and a generation of indifference, the science is finally catching up to the animal.

qatari-lng.title: The Long Burn
qatari-lng.subtitle: Qatar bet that the world would still want gas in 2050. The North Field expansion is making that bet harder to refuse.

scilly-isles-travel-guide.title: The Last Light of England
scilly-isles-travel-guide.subtitle: A photographer's field guide to the Isles of Scilly — granite, narcissi, and the Atlantic at the end of the British map.

turkmenistan-travel.title: The Country That Burns at Night
turkmenistan-travel.subtitle: Ten days through Turkmenistan — a marble capital built on natural gas, a forty-year fire in the Karakum, the ruins of one of medieval Asia's largest cities, and the canyons that almost no one in the country has seen.

storytelling-in-photography.title: Storytelling in Photography
storytelling-in-photography.subtitle: How photographers make pictures behave like sentences — the decisive moment, the photo essay, the layered frame

east-iceland-hiking-photography.title: Light at the Edge of the Map
east-iceland-hiking-photography.subtitle: Hiking and photographing East Iceland — eight FotoVue-grade locations from Vestrahorn to Klifbrekkufossar, with timing, bearings, exposure, and the small humilities a 65°N latitude imposes on a tripod.

audhd-life-around-the-engine.title: Life Around the Engine
audhd-life-around-the-engine.subtitle: A companion to The Engine That Cannot Be Redirected. Not a treatise on AuDHD brains, but a portrait of the rooms, routines, jobs, partnerships, and refusals that AuDHD adults build to live well at the speed their nervous systems insist upon.

drone-hyperlapse-mavic-3-pro.title: Drone Hyperlapse with the DJI Mavic 3 Pro
drone-hyperlapse-mavic-3-pro.subtitle: An encyclopaedic technical reference for the triple-camera flagship — sensors, modes, mathematics, regulation, post

cape-verde-travel-guide.title: Cape Verde: A Photographer's Field Guide to the Ten Islands
cape-verde-travel-guide.subtitle: Mindelo morna at midnight, the lava plain at Chã das Caldeiras, the green knife of Ribeira do Paul. A literary and operational guide to photographing the Cabo Verde archipelago across five islands at 15° north.

geography-trivia.title: A Cabinet of Geographic Curiosities
geography-trivia.subtitle: Twenty-two facts about the surface of the Earth that survive contact with the source

fish-farms-environmental-impact.title: The Blue Paradox: What Fish Farms Are Doing To The Ocean
fish-farms-environmental-impact.subtitle: Aquaculture now feeds the world more seafood than wild fisheries. Whether that is good news depends on which farm you visit — and which column of the ledger you are reading.

obsidian-complete-guide-with-claude-code.title: Obsidian, Feature by Feature, with Claude Code
obsidian-complete-guide-with-claude-code.subtitle: A reference book for every major Obsidian surface — vault, properties, links, plugins, sync, MCP — and how each one wires into a Claude Code agent on the same disk.

obsidian-and-claude-code.title: Obsidian and Claude Code
obsidian-and-claude-code.subtitle: Where thinking happens and where executing happens — and what lives on the seam between a note vault and an agent runtime.

looksmaxxing.title: Looksmaxxing
looksmaxxing.subtitle: How a vocabulary from the incelosphere became the operating system of young male beauty

london-housing-market-2026.title: London Housing 2026: Four Theses, Tested Against the Data
london-housing-market-2026.subtitle: Did flat affordability peak in 2022? Is the upsizing ladder broken? Are older owners anchoring? Is Stamp Duty the brake? What the numbers say — and don't.

virtual-barrels.title: Virtual Barrels: A Quant's Tour of the Oil Market
virtual-barrels.subtitle: Real options, spreads, volatility risk premium, and spread-option pricing — the mental models that turn physical crude into a tradeable portfolio.

virtual-barrels-chapter-notes.title: Virtual Barrels — Chapter Notes
virtual-barrels-chapter-notes.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference extracted verbatim from the library's Virtual Barrels chapter summaries.

python-for-algorithmic-trading-cookbook-.title: Python for Algorithmic Trading Cookbook — Chapter Notes
python-for-algorithmic-trading-cookbook-.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference synthesising the library's Python for Algorithmic Trading Cookbook chapter summaries.

forecasting-principles-and-practice-note.title: Forecasting: Principles and Practice — Book Notes
forecasting-principles-and-practice-note.subtitle: Full book notes synthesising every chapter of Hyndman & Athanasopoulos' Forecasting: Principles and Practice.

crude-oil-handbook-chapter-notes.title: Crude Oil Handbook — Chapter Notes
crude-oil-handbook-chapter-notes.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference synthesising the library's Crude Oil Handbook chapter summaries.

bayesian-analysis-with-python-chapter-no.title: Bayesian Analysis with Python — Chapter Notes
bayesian-analysis-with-python-chapter-no.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference synthesising the library's Bayesian Analysis with Python (Third Edition) chapter summaries.

applied-bayesian-statistics-notes.title: Applied Bayesian Statistics — Paper Notes
applied-bayesian-statistics-notes.subtitle: Synthesised summary of the Applied Bayesian Statistics paper preserving every Key Technical Concept verbatim.

advances-in-financial-machine-learning-c.title: Advances in Financial Machine Learning — Chapter Notes
advances-in-financial-machine-learning-c.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference synthesising Marcos López de Prado's Advances in Financial Machine Learning chapter summaries.

forty-classic-crude-oil-trades-chapter-n.title: 40 Classic Crude Oil Trades — Chapter Notes
forty-classic-crude-oil-trades-chapter-n.subtitle: Full chapter-by-chapter reference synthesising the library's 40 Classic Crude Oil Trades chapter summaries.

pfi-definitive-guide.title: What Happens When You Shuffle a Feature? The Definitive Guide to PFI
pfi-definitive-guide.subtitle: The simplest, most widely used, and most misunderstood tool in the ML interpretability toolkit. When it works, when it misleads, and what to use instead.

radically-open-dbt.title: Too Much of a Good Thing
radically-open-dbt.subtitle: For decades, psychiatry understood emotional suffering as a problem of too little control. A new therapy built on twenty-five years of clinical research is rewriting that assumption — and targeting a hidden epidemic of people who suffer not because they can't hold themselves together, but because they hold themselves together far too well.

catboost-guide.title: The Theoretically Principled Member of the Gradient Boosting Trinity
catboost-guide.subtitle: Ordered boosting eliminates prediction shift. Ordered target statistics handle categoricals without leakage. Symmetric trees regularise and accelerate.

fair-value-modelling-european-energy.title: The Price of Knowing
fair-value-modelling-european-energy.subtitle: Fair-value modelling in European energy markets — convenience yields, stochastic curves, and the algorithmic machinery that now sets the price of a marginal molecule.

feature-selection-ts-deep-dive.title: The Practitioner's Deep Dive: Time Series Feature Selection in Practice
feature-selection-ts-deep-dive.subtitle: Mechanics, intuition, diagnostics, and honest limits of 47 methods — with worked examples, inline plots, and how to tell genuine importance from statistical noise.

reverse-osmosis-desalination.title: The Membrane at the Edge of Thirst
reverse-osmosis-desalination.subtitle: Reverse osmosis was supposed to solve humanity's water crisis. It has come closer than any technology in history — and in doing so, has created crises of its own.

european-refining-encyclopaedic.title: The Last Barrels
european-refining-encyclopaedic.subtitle: Europe's refineries once turned the continent into an industrial powerhouse. Now, caught between cheap American crude, efficient Asian mega-plants, and a future that runs on electricity, they face a reckoning decades in the making.

european-gas-trading.title: The Invisible Arbitrage
european-gas-trading.subtitle: How traders exploit the price differentials hidden inside Europe's pipeline network — and how algorithms are learning to do it faster.

fort-st-elmo-sciam.title: The Gun Platform Above the Sea
fort-st-elmo-sciam.subtitle: The materials science of Miocene limestone, the fire-control geometry of a raised gun platform, and the ballistic accident that killed the Mediterranean's greatest corsair — examined through petrography, military engineering, and 450 years of weathering data.

fort-st-elmo.title: The Gun Platform Above the Sea
fort-st-elmo.subtitle: At the tip of the Sciberras Peninsula, the cavalier of Fort St Elmo rises above the star fort that held off 40,000 Ottoman troops for twenty-eight days in 1565 — and killed the greatest corsair of the sixteenth century.

ebm-definitive-guide.title: The Glass-Box That Rivals the Black Box
ebm-definitive-guide.subtitle: As accurate as gradient boosting, as interpretable as linear regression. Microsoft Research's EBM makes the case that you don't need SHAP if the model explains itself.

double-empathy-problem.title: The Gap Between Worlds
double-empathy-problem.subtitle: For decades, autism research pointed to a single source of the social difficulty between autistic and non-autistic people: the autistic person's deficit. A sociologist who is also autistic, working in the shadow of his son's diagnosis, proposed something different — and the data has been following him ever since.

autonomy-centred-coaching.title: The Freedom to Change
autonomy-centred-coaching.subtitle: For seven decades, psychotherapy assumed that the expert in the room was the therapist. A quiet revolution — grounded in rigorous science — has been dismantling that idea one session at a time.

stochastic-dp-encyclopaedic-article.title: The Equation That Decides: A Deep Dive into Stochastic Dynamic Programming
stochastic-dp-encyclopaedic-article.subtitle: In 1953, a RAND mathematician wrote an equation that became the heart of sequential decision-making — from inventory warehouses to AlphaGo. Seven decades later, the world is still learning how to solve it.

audhd-entelechy-v2.title: The Engine That Cannot Be Redirected
audhd-entelechy-v2.subtitle: Inside the neuroscience of why AuDHD individuals carry an almost ungovernable drive toward autonomy — and what Aristotle's concept of entelechy reveals about a brain pursuing its own fulfilment.

the-doers-and-the-knowers.title: The Doers and the Knowers
the-doers-and-the-knowers.subtitle: Knowledge has been commoditised. What remains scarce is the willingness to act on it. The economy is inverting its oldest hierarchy — and nobody has told the universities.

crude-markets-briefing.title: The Crude Market in Full
crude-markets-briefing.subtitle: A technical reference on fundamentals, benchmarks, derivatives, and physical trading mechanics — assembled for a crude analyst interview in the week the Strait of Hormuz remained closed.

european-refining-margins-economist.title: The Cracking Point
european-refining-margins-economist.subtitle: Europe's refining sector is being squeezed from every direction. The question is no longer whether it will shrink, but how fast — and what replaces it.

malta-slavery-sciam.title: The Colour of the Walls
malta-slavery-sciam.subtitle: Archaeology, archival demography, and material culture analysis are rewriting the history of enslaved labour in Hospitaller Malta — revealing what the fortifications conceal.

malta-slavery.title: The Colour of the Walls
malta-slavery.subtitle: Valletta's golden fortifications were built by the hands of enslaved Muslims, Jews, and Christians. For 268 years, the Knights of St John ran one of the Mediterranean's largest slave economies. The stones remember what the plaques do not.

malta-aqueduct.title: The City That Water Built
malta-aqueduct.subtitle: For four hundred years, a limestone aqueduct carried the only thing that made Valletta possible. The water has stopped flowing. The crisis has not.

fort_st_elmo_ng.title: The Cavalier That Broke an Empire
fort_st_elmo_ng.subtitle: For thirty-one days in 1565, the raised gun platform at the heart of Fort St Elmo held back the most powerful armada Islam had ever sent westward — and changed the course of Mediterranean history forever.

ts-feature-engineering-guide.title: The Bridge Between Time Series and Tabular ML: A Systematic Guide to Feature Engineering
ts-feature-engineering-guide.subtitle: Lags, rolling statistics, Fourier transforms, calendar features, and the leakage traps that invalidate everything.

splitwise-python-article.title: Splitwise in Python: The Complete Practitioner's Guide
splitwise-python-article.subtitle: From OAuth handshakes to debt-minimisation graphs — everything a data engineer needs to wire Python into Splitwise's REST API.

safe-ts-article.title: SAFE: Surrogate-Assisted Feature Extraction for Time Series
safe-ts-article.subtitle: Extracting monotonic, piecewise-constant feature transformations from black-box time series models using ALE profiles and surrogate trees.

rag-2026-definitive-guide.title: RAG in 2026: Still Essential, No Longer Default
rag-2026-definitive-guide.subtitle: Long-context models can swallow 2 million tokens. Agents can search, verify, and reason in real time. Fine-tuning bakes knowledge into weights.

avoidance-based-behaviour.title: Moving Away
avoidance-based-behaviour.subtitle: Avoidance is the oldest survival behaviour in the animal kingdom. In the human mind, refined by language and memory into something far more elaborate, it has become both a cornerstone of psychological protection and, when it escapes its proper boundaries, the architecture of suffering itself.

conformal-prediction-guide.title: Guaranteed Prediction Intervals for Any Model: The Definitive Guide
conformal-prediction-guide.subtitle: Distribution-free, finite-sample coverage guarantees. No Gaussianity. No Bayesian priors. Works with any model.

xlendi-wreck.title: Fourteen Minutes at the Edge of the World
xlendi-wreck.subtitle: At 110 metres beneath Xlendi Bay, a Phoenician ship has been waiting 2,700 years to be found. The technical divers who reach it have about fourteen minutes before the ocean demands they leave.

shapash-timeseries-technical-article.title: Explaining Time Series Forecasts with Shapash: A Practitioner's Guide
shapash-timeseries-technical-article.subtitle: How to use MAIF's explainability library to make lag features, rolling statistics, and calendar effects interpretable to business stakeholders — from feature engineering to production deployment.

european-gas-markets-economist.title: Europe's Gas Gamble
european-gas-markets-economist.subtitle: The continent thought it had solved its energy crisis. The Strait of Hormuz closure proved it had merely postponed it.

tanzanite-born-from-fire.title: Born from Fire
tanzanite-born-from-fire.subtitle: Deep beneath Tanzania's Merelani Hills, young men descend 400 metres on wooden ladders to extract the only gemstone on Earth found in a single place. The deposit could be exhausted within a generation. This is the story of the people who mine it — and the country fighting to keep its wealth.

tanzanite-cover-story.title: Born from Fire
tanzanite-cover-story.subtitle: The crystallography, tectonic genesis, and contested economics of the world's only tanzanite deposit — a 585-million-year-old mineralogical accident occupying 14 km² of northern Tanzania.

renzulli-three-rings.title: Beyond the Number
renzulli-three-rings.subtitle: For most of the twentieth century, a single number determined which children the educational system recognised as gifted. A Connecticut psychologist spent his career arguing that this was not only wrong, but that what it missed was precisely the thing that mattered most.

probabilistic-forecasting-guide.title: Beyond Point Forecasts: Prediction Intervals That Actually Work
probabilistic-forecasting-guide.subtitle: Quantile regression for adaptiveness. Conformal prediction for guarantees. CQR for both. MAPIE for production.

the-monotonic-constraint-trick.title: The Monotonic Constraint Trick That Prevents Nonsensical Predictions
the-monotonic-constraint-trick.subtitle: How one XGBoost parameter can enforce domain knowledge and eliminate predictions that violate common sense
